Return key priority for model calls.

    False = user key from frontend/user_settings.
    True = server admin key.

    During a 1688 run:
    - if the account allows admin key, use admin key only;
    - otherwise use the local/frontend key only.

    Outside a 1688 run, keep default_order for compatibility.

runtime data outside resources/backend lets installers replace the whole

Return the local runtime data directory.

    Desktop builds receive OZON_BACKEND_RUNTIME_DIR from Electron. Keeping
    runtime data outside resources/backend lets installers replace the whole
    app directory without having to delete around user files.
